security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; frame-src 'self' https://hooks.slack.com; object-src 'self' data:; child-src 'self';

bundle.longDescription: Gestor de catalogos y pedidos para perifericos gamer. Carga PDFs, Excels o CSVs, arma pedidos con calculo de rentabilidad automatico.
